property_address: Flat 123, Sample street, Sample city, AB1 CD3

rooms.name: Balcony
rooms.summary: The balcony presents as a modern external space with dark composite decking, black metal balustrading and light painted walls/structural surrounds. Overall it appears in good condition and reasonably clean, with only minor surface marks visible on the flooring and no obvious structural damage. The adjoining glazed door and framing appear intact and the view beyond indicates the balcony is located within a contemporary apartment development.

items.description: External balcony walls and structural surrounds in light painted finish.

defects: small white speck/debris visible on floor surface mid level

items.name: Threshold strip
items.description: Slim metal threshold strip at the balcony door line.

rooms.name: Bathroom
rooms.summary: A high-spec contemporary bathroom presented in very good overall decorative order, with extensive glossy tiling, mirrored surfaces and integrated sanitaryware. The room appears generally clean and well maintained, with only light marks visible on a few reflective/white surfaces and minor limescale or water spotting on some chrome and glass elements. Overall condition is good to excellent, with no obvious structural damage visible in the supplied photos.

rooms.name: Bedroom
rooms.summary: Contemporary bedroom presented in generally tidy condition with neutral décor and fitted carpet. The room appears lightly used overall, with the main notable issues being a number of small marks/scuffs to the painted walls and some visible wear to the mattress. Window dressing, furniture and fittings are otherwise in sound order from the photos provided.

rooms.name: Entrance Hall
rooms.summary: A modern entrance hall presented in generally good decorative order with white emulsion walls, white woodwork and light oak-effect flooring. Overall cleanliness is good/domestic standard, with a number of light scuffs and faint marks visible to walls and woodwork, but no significant damage apparent. The hall contains extensive fitted electrical controls, several internal doors and a cloak/storage cupboard area, all in sound condition.

rooms.name: Reception & Open Plan Kitchen
rooms.summary: A high-spec open plan reception and kitchen area presented in clean, well maintained decorative order overall. The room appears bright and contemporary with neutral finishes, integrated appliances and coordinated furniture, though a number of visible furnishings show light-to-moderate wear and marking. The kitchen fittings and structural surfaces are generally in good condition, with localized marks noted to some upholstered items, painted walls and a small area of door damage.

rooms.name: Walk In Wardrobe
rooms.summary: The walk-in wardrobe is freshly decorated and presented in generally very good order, with white painted walls and white woodwork throughout. The room appears clean overall, with fitted carpet and a timber-look internal storage system/wardrobe in good condition. Minor wear is visible in a few localized areas, including small marks to the door leaf and slight scuffing to the wall surface and flooring threshold area.
